case_title: J M TAPPE VS. ADALBERTO RAMIREZ et al

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-04-2003 - CASE SETTLED PER STIPULATED JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT RICKY GRIFFITH ONLY WITH EVICTION STAYED THRU 1/6/04 AT 5:00 PM. MATTER REMAINS ON CALENDAR AS TO THE THREE 11/19/03 DEFAULTED DEFENDANTS. REMOVED FROM JURY TRIAL CALENDAR AND SET TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2003. JUDGE PRO TEM ARNOLD EVJE; CLERK: V.MACK REPORTER: VALERIE PAPALE CSR #6899

MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-08-2003 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON DEC-08-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206 AS TO THE 11/19/03 THREE DEFAULTED DEFENDANTS ADALBERTO RAMIREZ, KARINA DECUIR AND ERIC DECUIR.
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-04-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 218
MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2003 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON DEC-08-2003 AT 8:00 AM IN DEPT. 611, DIANE ELAN WICK FOR PROVE UP.

JUDGE DIANE WICK, CLERK-BETH WILBER, REPORTER-BRENDA FIELDS: C/C FOR JURY TRIAL, REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR, LAWRNECE KONCZ APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS, CASE PROCEEDS AS A PROVE-UP WITHOUT DEFENDANTS, COURT RULES FOR PLAINTIFF, PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAPPE, J M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, ADALBERTO DECUIR, KARINA M CELIA DECUIR, ERIC ANTHONY GRIFFITH, RICKY L. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1040 LARKIN STREET $3,780.00 RENT, $2,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $648.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,928.00, LEASE FORFEITED, MONEY JUDGMENT DOES NOT INCLUDE RICKY GRIFFITH, BUT ALL OTHER PARTS OF THE JUDGMENT APPLY TO HIM AND ANY AND ALL OTHER OCCUPANTS IN POSSESSION; SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-04-2003 Continued To Dec-08-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-08-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-08-2003 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference hearing this day in Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: V.Mack/S Ravinantapricha, Reporter: Valerie Papale CSR: #6899
Appearances:
Lawrence John Knocz, Esq., for Plaintiff J.M. Tappe.
Ricky Griffith, Defendant in Pro Per.
Parties met in Dept. 207 with Judge Pro Tem Arnold Evje and reached a settlement stipulated judgment for possession. Terms of the ORAL settlement were read into the record as follows:
The stipulated judgment for possession of the premises located at 1040 Larkin St., San Francisco, CA. This judgment is to be merged with the 11/19/03 defaulted judgment for the remaining three defendants Adalberto Ramirez, Karina M. Celia Decuir and Eric Anthony Decuir.
Eviction for defendant Ricky Griffith is stayed until 5:00PM on JAN-06-2004. Defendant agrees to vacate the premises on the record in open court.
